info.title: CliqRelay API
info.description: CliqRelay API - step-by-step visual documentation platform

get.description: Polls the status of a guide export
Get all guides for a user
Returns the total count of non-deleted guides for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a demo guide with predefined steps

get.description: Get all guides starred by the current user
Retrieves a single guide by its ID

post.description: Triggers an async export of a guide (e.g. PDF)
Recalculates the synthetic duration for a guide based on its steps
Stars a guide for the current user

delete.description: Unstars a guide for the current user

post.description: Unarchives a guide and returns it to draft status
Unpublishes a guide and returns it to draft status

get.description: Returns the health status of the API

get.summary: Get all media assets by step ID
get.description: Retrieves all media assets for a given step

post.description: Creates a new media asset associated with a step

get.description: Retrieves a single media asset by its ID

patch.description: Updates an existing media asset's metadata

get.summary: Get all steps by guide ID
get.description: Retrieves all steps for a given guide, ordered by sort_order

post.description: Creates a new step within a guide

get.description: Retrieves a single step by its ID

post.description: Duplicates a step including its media assets

get.description: Returns all teams for the authenticated user's organizations

post.description: Creates a media asset record after the upload finishes
Generates a presigned S3 URL for uploading a screenshot

ExportGuideFormat.description: The type of the guide document to export

StepAction.description: The browser interaction type captured for the step

StepCanvasType.description: The type of the canvas element

StepType.description: The browser interaction type captured for the step
